zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Reynes於大約1497年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾克里夫頓 雷恩斯時，她的父親Richard de Reynes II28歲，母親Maud Boothe26歲。她於1516年與Thomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGF結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Reynes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Raines
meanings: English: variant of Raine , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Rayne (Essex), recorded in the Domesday Book as Raines in the 11th century. The etymology of the placename is uncertain, but it may derive from Old English hrægene ‘hut, shelter’ or from a pre-English river name for Pods Brook (a river on which Rayne lies), cognate with the German river name Regen (a tributary of the Danube), formed from the Indo-European root reg- ‘wet, moisten, water’.
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Rennes in Brittany, France.

nameMeanings.name: Anne

meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Reynes was born about 1497, in Clifton Reynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard de Reynes II, was 28 and her mother, Maud Boothe, was 26. She married Thomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGF in 1516. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Reynes est née environ 1497, à Clifton Reynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard de Reynes II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Maud Boothe, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGF en 1516. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Reynes è nata il circa 1497 nel Clifton Reynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard de Reynes II, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Maud Boothe, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGF nel 1516. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Reynesが約1497年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアクリフトン レインスで生まれた時，父Richard de Reynes IIは28歳，母Maud Bootheは26歳であった。1516年にThomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGFと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Reynes(이)가 대략 1497년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 클리프턴 리인스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard de Reynes II(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maud Boothe(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1516년 Thomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGF(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Reynes родилась около 1497 г. в местности клифтон ринесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard de Reynes II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Boothe, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Esq Lord Of St. Albans Lowe 13th GGF в 1516 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.
